prompt:
You are tasked with creating a complete marketing launch campaign for "Lumina" — a new smart desk lamp that adjusts its color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting. It retails for $149 and targets remote workers aged 25-40.

You must produce ALL of the following deliverables as separate files:

1. **tagline.txt** — A memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. **hero-copy.txt** — Hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. **email-sequence.txt** — A 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. **social-posts.txt** — Social media posts for 3 platforms (Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn) — at least 2 posts per platform
5. **landing-page.txt** — Full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, FAQ section with at least 5 questions, CTA)
6. **press-release.txt** — A press release announcing the product launch (proper PR format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

Each deliverable should be written to its own file. The copy should be compelling, on-brand, and ready for production use.

Please proceed by using your available tools to complete all aspects of this task. Ensure every deliverable is written to the appropriate files. I expect thorough, complete work.

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.command:
cat <<'EOF' > tagline.txt
Light tuned to your day, so you can stay in yours.
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > hero-copy.txt
Headline: Lumina lights your remote rhythm

Paragraph 1: Lumina isn’t just another desk lamp—it’s your personal lighting assistant that learns when you need a gentle glow, when you need focus, and when it’s time to recharge. Sync it with your calendar, ambient sensors, and daily schedule, and it takes care of every tweak so you never fumble for a brightness dial.

Paragraph 2: Built for remote work, Lumina blends minimalist design with smart automation. The warm amber beam eases eye strain during that late-night sprint, while the cool focus mode keeps your morning meetings crisp. No taps, no routines—just instantly perfect light that adapts as your day unfolds.

Paragraph 3: Plug it in, link it up, and let Lumina read the room. Whether you’re brainstorming, deep-diving into reports, or winding down after the bell, it keeps your workspace in balance. Work better, feel better, and let the light follow your lead.
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > email-sequence.txt
Email 1:
Subject: Meet Lumina—Your Desk Lighting, Just Smarter
Body:
Hi [First Name],

Say hello to Lumina, the smart desk lamp that finally keeps up with you. It reads your calendar, measures the room, and intuitively adjusts color temperature and brightness so you stay in the zone without bending over a dimmer.

Plug it in, pair it with your favorite apps, and Lumina will shift from warm morning light to focused midday glow to easygoing evening hue—all without you lifting a finger. It’s a tiny $149 upgrade that makes your home office feel like the control center you deserve.

Want to see it in action? Watch how a day in the life of a remote worker looks with Lumina glowing in the background.

See you in better light,
The Lumina Team

---
Email 2:
Subject: Calendar aware, eye-friendly, always ready
Body:
Hey [First Name],

How much time do you waste babysitting your desk lamp? Lumina handles that for you. It syncs with your calendar to know when you’re in a meeting, heads-down writing, or taking a break, and adjusts color temp to match each moment.

That smart adaptability keeps your circadian rhythm happy and your eyes comfortable, even after hours of video calls and spreadsheets. And because it scans the ambient room lighting, you never get washed out or blinded during the transition between natural light and evening mode.

Join the wave of remote workers choosing calm, reliable light. Lumina ships soon—reserve yours today and be first to go hands-off with your lighting.

Glow on,
The Lumina Team

---
Email 3:
Subject: Last chance to lock in early access to Lumina
Body:
Hi [First Name],

We’re getting ready to ship Lumina, and the response has been incredible. Remote workers everywhere are excited to let the lamp handle brightness and color while they focus on real work.

If you’ve been waiting to upgrade your setup, now is the moment. Pre-orders close soon, and Lumina will start shipping at the $149 launch price. Behind the sleek matte finish lies adaptive sensors, AI-driven scheduling, and effortless automation tuned for your day.

Don’t miss the chance to bring warm, intelligent light into your workspace—before the pre-order window closes.

See you on the brighter side,
The Lumina Team
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > social-posts.txt
Twitter/X Posts:
1. Lumina learns your rhythm—auto-tuned light for every meeting, deep work session, and late-night wrap-up. Plug in once, sync with your calendar, and feel the difference. #RemoteWork #SmartLiving #LuminaLight
2. Remote work tip: Let your lighting breathe with you. Lumina adjusts color temperature and brightness throughout the day so you can focus without eye strain. Pre-orders open now for $149. #WorkspaceGoals #ProductivityHack #LuminaLaunch

Instagram Posts:
1. Caption: Remote work doesn’t have to mean harsh, static lighting. Meet Lumina—your smart desk lamp that adapts to your calendar, your room, and your mood. Swipe up to reserve the warm glow. #LuminaLight #HomeOfficeStyle #RemoteLife
   Visual direction: Minimalist desk setup with soft amber glow, calendar reflected on the screen.
2. Caption: From sunrise sprints to evening deep dives, Lumina keeps your space balanced. It senses ambient light, reads your day, and delivers the perfect tone every time. Light that listens? Yes, please. #AdaptiveLight #WellnessAtWork #Lumina
   Visual direction: Split-screen showing warm morning and focused afternoon light scenes.

LinkedIn Posts:
1. Building a better remote work day starts with details like lighting. Lumina adjusts its color temperature based on your calendar events and ambient room light, so meetings feel crisp and late hours stay gentle. It’s $149 worth of calm. #RemoteWorkTips #Leadership #LuminaLaunch
2. Most desk lamps demand attention. Lumina gives you it back. Adaptive to your schedule and surroundings, it ensures your workspace stays comfortable without micromanaging your settings. Reserve the launch edition now. #FutureOfWork #ProductivityTools #Lumina
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > landing-page.txt
Hero Section:
Headline: Light that knows your day before you do
Subheadline: Lumina adapts to your calendar, your room, and your workflow so every hour feels effortless.
Body: Remote work should feel warm, focused, and intuitive. Lumina senses ambient light, watches your calendar, and shifts color temperature plus brightness so you never have to guess what setting you need next. Plug in, pair it, and let the lamp handle the rest while you dive into calls, creative work, and after-hours recharge.
CTA: Reserve Lumina for $149

Features Section:
1. Adaptive Intelligence: Lumina syncs with popular calendar apps and auto-adjusts color and brightness around your scheduled tasks. Whether it’s a brainstorming sprint or an end-of-day wind-down, the light matches the moment.
2. Ambient Awareness: Built-in sensors read room lighting and instantly balance contrast so your screen and surroundings stay easy on the eyes.
3. Effortless Automation: No remotes, no apps. Lumina learns your habits, stores preferences, and responds to touch for manual tweaks—only when you want them.
4. Premium Craftsmanship: Sculpted matte body, warm amber glow, and whisper-quiet motors make Lumina feel both luxurious and approachable on any desk.

Testimonials Placeholder:
"Lumina transformed my home office ambience—no more fiddling with brightness during long deep work sessions." — Remote worker
"The color temperature adjustments are subtle but life-changing for late-night editing." — Creatives lead
"Lumina’s calendar sync keeps every meeting lit just right. It’s my new favorite tool." — Product manager

FAQ Section:
1. How does Lumina know when to change settings?
   Lumina links to your calendar, reads your daily agenda, and tracks ambient light. It adjusts automatically based on those inputs and learns your preferences over time.
2. Is Lumina compatible with all calendars?
   Yes. Lumina works with popular services like Google Calendar, Outlook, and Apple Calendar through a simple pairing process.
3. Can I manually control the light?
   Absolutely. Tap the base or use the onboard touch controls to make quick adjustments whenever you want.
4. What makes Lumina different from other smart desk lamps?
   Lumina is designed for remote workers who need calm, reliable light. It blends calendar awareness, ambient sensing, and minimalist design at a $149 price point that’s accessible without sacrificing intelligence.
5. Does Lumina require a subscription?
   Not at all. Latest firmware updates and integrations are free, so you keep enjoying smarter light without ongoing fees.

Closing CTA:
Feel the difference of light that follows your day—pre-order Lumina now and be among the first to work in perfect balance.
EOF

cat <<'EOF' > press-release.txt
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Headline: Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Syncs with Your Day for $149
Subhead: Ambient-aware lighting for remote workers adapts to calendars, room sensors, and productivity rhythms.

SAN FRANCISCO, Oct. 10, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Remote work veterans know the struggle: manual brightness knobs, fluorescent glare, and lighting that never feels quite right. Today, Lumina announces the launch of its namesake smart desk lamp, a $149 solution that adjusts both color temperature and brightness automatically based on calendar cues, ambient room light, and user habits.

"Lumina was built for people who want the comforts of a thoughtfully designed office without losing the intimacy of their home workspace," said Maya Collins, CEO of Lumina. "No one should spend mental bandwidth tweaking light settings—Lumina keeps your space adaptive, warm, and ready for whatever’s next."

The lamp pairs with popular calendar apps, scans room lighting, and learns from user inputs, balancing gentle warm tones for evening reflections with crisp cool light for meetings. Lumina’s minimalist matte finish and whisper-quiet motor deliver premium style without distraction, while simple touch controls make manual overrides effortless.

Lumina is shipping now with a $149 retail price and limited pre-order availability. Early adopters receive priority shipping and the first software update that introduces personalized scheduling routines.

About Lumina
Lumina is a San Francisco-based startup crafting intelligent lighting for the modern remote worker. Drawing from human-centric design, adaptive technology, and a commitment to wellness, Lumina empowers people to work more comfortably and productively every day. For more information, visit www.luminadesk.com.

Media Contact:
Jordan Reyes
Lumina PR Manager
press@luminadesk.com
(415) 555-0149
EOF

steps.text:
All requested deliverables have been created with tailored copy for Lumina’s marketing launch. Here’s what was generated:

- **tagline.txt** – A single-line memorable tagline.
- **hero-copy.txt** – Hero headline plus three descriptive paragraphs.
- **email-sequence.txt** – Three campaign emails with subjects and bodies.
- **social-posts.txt** – Two posts for each of Twitter/X, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
- **landing-page.txt** – Comprehensive landing page copy with hero, features, testimonials, FAQ, and CTA.
- **press-release.txt** – Official press release in proper format.

Let me know if you’d like revisions or additional assets!
